_comment: Hand-curated featured stories. Rendered above the auto-aggregated stream on /feed and the homepage feed preview. Each entry mirrors the aggregated-feed.json item schema, plus a `featured: true` marker and an editorial `blurb` line.

items.title: YouTube expands its AI likeness detection technology to celebrities
items.summary: YouTube's AI-powered face-detection tool — built with the December 2024 CAA partnership and rolled out to top creators in 2025 — is now available to talent agencies and the celebrities they represent. CAA, UTA, WME, and Untitled Management consulted on the expansion. Subjects can flag and request takedown of unauthorized AI-generated videos featuring their face.
items.blurb: The most concrete platform-side answer yet to the gap state law leaves open. Worth tracking how takedown turnaround actually performs at scale, and whether other platforms follow.
